item.name: Atlassian Delete Default Actors From Project Role

query.description: The user account ID of the user to remove as a default actor.
The group ID of the group to be removed as a default actor. This parameter cannot be used with the `group` parameter.
The group name of the group to be removed as a default actor.This parameter cannot be used with the `groupId` parameter. As a group's name can change, use of `groupId` is recommended.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the project role. Use [Get all project roles](#api-rest-api-3-role-get) to get a list of project role IDs.

request.description:
Deletes the [default actors](#api-rest-api-3-resolution-get) from a project role. You may delete a group or user, but you cannot delete a group and a user in the same request.

Changing a project role's default actors does not affect project role members for projects already created.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.

query.description: The user account ID of the user to remove as a default actor.
The group ID of the group to be removed as a default actor. This parameter cannot be used with the `group` parameter.
The group name of the group to be removed as a default actor.This parameter cannot be used with the `groupId` parameter. As a group's name can change, use of `groupId` is recommended.

response.name: Returned if the request is invalid.

query.description: The user account ID of the user to remove as a default actor.
The group ID of the group to be removed as a default actor. This parameter cannot be used with the `group` parameter.
The group name of the group to be removed as a default actor.This parameter cannot be used with the `groupId` parameter. As a group's name can change, use of `groupId` is recommended.

response.name: Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.

query.description: The user account ID of the user to remove as a default actor.
The group ID of the group to be removed as a default actor. This parameter cannot be used with the `group` parameter.
The group name of the group to be removed as a default actor.This parameter cannot be used with the `groupId` parameter. As a group's name can change, use of `groupId` is recommended.

response.name: Returned if the user does not have administrative permissions.

query.description: The user account ID of the user to remove as a default actor.
The group ID of the group to be removed as a default actor. This parameter cannot be used with the `group` parameter.
The group name of the group to be removed as a default actor.This parameter cannot be used with the `groupId` parameter. As a group's name can change, use of `groupId` is recommended.

response.name: Returned if the project role is not found.

query.description: The user account ID of the user to remove as a default actor.
The group ID of the group to be removed as a default actor. This parameter cannot be used with the `group` parameter.
The group name of the group to be removed as a default actor.This parameter cannot be used with the `groupId` parameter. As a group's name can change, use of `groupId` is recommended.

item.name: Atlassian Get Default Actors For Project Role

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the project role. Use [Get all project roles](#api-rest-api-3-role-get) to get a list of project role IDs.

request.description:
Returns the [default actors](#api-rest-api-3-resolution-get) for the project role.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is invalid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have administrative permissions.
Returned if the project role is not found.

item.name: Atlassian Add Default Actors To Project Role

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the project role. Use [Get all project roles](#api-rest-api-3-role-get) to get a list of project role IDs.

request.description:
Adds [default actors](#api-rest-api-3-resolution-get) to a role. You may add groups or users, but you cannot add groups and users in the same request.

Changing a project role's default actors does not affect project role members for projects already created.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is invalid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have administrative permissions.
Returned if the project role is not found.

query.description: The ID of the project role that will replace the one being deleted.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the project role to delete. Use [Get all project roles](#api-rest-api-3-role-get) to get a list of project role IDs.

request.description:
Deletes a project role. You must specify a replacement project role if you wish to delete a project role that is in use.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.

query.description: The ID of the project role that will replace the one being deleted.

response.name: Returned if the request is invalid or if the replacement project role is not found.

query.description: The ID of the project role that will replace the one being deleted.

response.name: Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.

query.description: The ID of the project role that will replace the one being deleted.

response.name: Returned if the user does not have administrative permissions.

query.description: The ID of the project role that will replace the one being deleted.

response.name: Returned if the project role being deleted is not found.

query.description: The ID of the project role that will replace the one being deleted.

response.name: Returned if the project role being deleted is in use and a replacement project role is not specified in the request.

query.description: The ID of the project role that will replace the one being deleted.

item.name: Atlassian Get Project Role By Id

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the project role. Use [Get all project roles](#api-rest-api-3-role-get) to get a list of project role IDs.

request.description:
Gets the project role details and the default actors associated with the role. The list of default actors is sorted by display name.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have administrative permissions.
Returned if the project role is not found.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the project role. Use [Get all project roles](#api-rest-api-3-role-get) to get a list of project role IDs.

request.description:
Updates either the project role's name or its description.

You cannot update both the name and description at the same time using this operation. If you send a request with a name and a description only the name is updated.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is invalid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have administrative permissions.
Returned if the project role is not found.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the project role. Use [Get all project roles](#api-rest-api-3-role-get) to get a list of project role IDs.

request.description:
Updates the project role's name and description. You must include both a name and a description in the request.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is not valid. The `name` cannot be empty or start or end with whitespace.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have administrative permissions.
Returned if the project role is not found.
